creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a problem with one patch in the files directory:

[danilo ecgi$] make patch
===>  License BSD3CLAUSE accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for ecgi-0.6.3_3
===>   ecgi-0.6.3_3 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by ecgi-0.6.3_3 for building
===>  Extracting for ecgi-0.6.3_3
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ecgi-0.6.3.tar.xz.
===>  Patching for ecgi-0.6.3_3
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ecgi-0.6.3_3
1 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to html2h/html2h.c.rej
=> Patch patch-html2h_html2h.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es) patch-Makefile patch-html2h_Makefile applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1
